source: ## Frontend Redirect (Request Url / Request Query String)

parameters.name: rec_trade_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this transaction generated by our server.

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: A self-defined identifier for each transaction. Doesn't allow null.

parameters.name: bank_transaction_id
parameters.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. Must be unique.

request.description: After an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction is completed, TapPay redirects the user to frontend_redirect_url via web redirection with four query-string parameters. Frontend redirect could be faked; implement backend notify and verify via Record API.

missing: HTTP method not explicitly stated (inferred GET from query-string redirect)
Merchant response for the frontend redirect not stated
Whether the redirect is signed/verifiable (source notes it 'could be faked')
